title: 9 Simple Steps to Actually Make Money in 2025
description: Sandeep shares the exact blueprint that took him from being a homeless musician to a multi-millionaire founder and CEO. Whether you're aiming for a high-paying job, building a thriving freelance career, or launching your own business, he reveals the most efficient path to making at least $5K a month in 2025.
